task: Place the white towel on the tripod.
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A white cloth is on a black table. A tripod is in the background. The cloth is soft and flat; the tripod has a base and a central column. STRATEGY - First, reach for the cloth to grasp it. Then, transport it to the tripod's base. Finally, place the cloth on the base. Failure modes include dropping the cloth during transport or misplacing it on the tripod. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the cloth at its body for a stable grasp. Step 2 grasp the cloth's body for secure hold. Step 3 transport the cloth to the tripod's base. Step 4 place the cloth on the tripod's base.
Goal: on(white_towel, tripod)
Scene: white_towel, tripod, table
Step 1: reach(white_towel)
  affordance_region: the body of the white towel
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, white_towel, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, white_towel) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(white_towel)
  affordance_region: the body of the white towel
  contact: holding(white_towel) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(white_towel)
Step 3: transport(white_towel -> tripod)
  affordance_region: the base of the tripod
  spatial: above(white_towel, tripod, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(white_towel)
  done_when: above(white_towel, tripod, 0.05)
Step 4: place(white_towel -> tripod)
  affordance_region: the base of the tripod
  contact: surface_contact(white_towel, tripod) [completion]; released(white_towel) [completion]
  pose: stable(white_towel) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(white_towel, tripod) AND released(white_towel)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the white towel
the body of the white towel
